query:
UPDATE game_agents SET current_node_id = REPLACE(current_node_id, 'taipei-', 'tp-') WHERE current_node_id LIKE 'taipei-%';
UPDATE game_agents SET target_node_id = REPLACE(target_node_id, 'taipei-', 'tp-') WHERE target_node_id LIKE 'taipei-%';
command:
